message:
refactor(store,command): move RSS reading to fr-store and add memory sampling API

The read_rss_bytes() helper was defined in fr-command but logically
belongs in fr-store since it feeds the memory tracking state. Moving it
to fr-store allows the store to own its own memory sampling, and the
new observe_memory_sample() method updates both the RSS field and the
peak high-water mark atomically.

- fr-store: add read_rss_bytes() (moved from fr-command) and
  stat_used_memory_rss field; add observe_memory_sample() that updates
  RSS and peak in one call; change peak_perc calculation to use RSS
  instead of logical used_memory for more accurate reporting
- fr-command: remove read_rss_bytes() (now imported from fr-store);
  call store.observe_memory_sample() in INFO memory section so RSS
  stays fresh even outside the server main loop; remove manual peak
  tracking in INFO (now handled by observe_memory_sample)
- Cargo.toml: add fr-bench crate to workspace members
- Add crates/fr-bench/ scaffold for Redis-compatible benchmarks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+[package]
+name = "fr-bench"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+description = "FrankenRedis TCP benchmark harness"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fr-bench"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+fr-protocol = { path = "../fr-protocol" }
+hdrhistogram = "7.5.4"
+serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1.0.149"
